New Project Support to our University within the scope of TUBITAK Career Development Program

Department of International Trade and Finance faculty member Dr. Assist. Prof. Murat Tiniç’s project titled “The Effect of Credit Relationship on Stock Prices: The Role of Intermediary Institutions in Information Transfer through Syndicated Loans” has been entitled to be supported within the scope of TÜBİTAK ARDEB 3501 Career Program.

We congratulate Murat and wish him success in his research.
